footer.tagline: Religious articles to celebrate faith and the most sacred moments of your family, with love and devotion from Bonita Springs.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Tienda San José. Dedicated to the Holy Family.

hero.description: Your trusted store in Bonita Springs, Florida, for religious articles that celebrate faith and family. Discover our carefully curated selection of meaningful pieces.

collections.title: Sacred Collections
collections.description: Find inspiration and devotion in our main categories, curated with reverence and attention to detail.

trust.shippingDesc: Every order carefully packed and safely shipped to any state.
trust.blessedDesc: Each article receives a special blessing before reaching your hands.
trust.careDesc: We are a family serving your family. Reach out anytime.

product.shippingText: All our orders are processed and shipped from Bonita Springs, FL within 1-2 business days. Estimated delivery time is 3-7 business days across the United States. We ship via USPS Priority Mail and UPS. You will receive a tracking number by email once your order has shipped.
product.careJewelry: To maintain the shine and beauty of your jewelry pieces: store them in a dry place away from moisture, clean with a soft cotton cloth, avoid contact with perfumes, lotions, and chemicals, and remove before bathing or exercising. For 925 silver pieces, a special anti-tarnish cloth will extend their lifespan.
product.careCandles: For safe candle use: never leave them burning unattended, keep away from drafts and flammable materials, place on heat-resistant surfaces, trim the wick to 1 cm before each use for a clean and even flame, and extinguish when less than 2 cm of wax remains.
product.careClothing: To preserve the whiteness and delicacy of ceremonial garments: hand wash in cold water with mild soap, do not use chlorine bleach, dry in the shade laid flat on a surface, iron inside-out on low heat, and store in a fabric bag or tissue paper to prevent yellowing.
product.careDefault: Handle each item with care and respect. Store in a dry place, away from direct sunlight and moisture. Clean with a soft, dry cloth. For wooden pieces, occasionally apply olive oil with a cloth to maintain their natural luster.
